data.content: Shipment review could not be completed because the main worktree was dirty during review. Verified that origin/main and local main point to merge commit 527d1b65d14b, and knot tags include commit:19eb28e7f9df, commit:7975dfaa0e33, and commit:527d1b65d14b, but the required read-only shipment review gate was blocked by the untracked repository file agent-metadata-normalization.md. Rolled back to ready_for_implementation per failure-path instructions.
